entry.name: servers
entry.label: Stations
entry.default: [ {"active":true,"hostname":"https://mangoradio.stream.laut.fm/mangoradio?t302=2022-12-13_14-45-27&uuid=b8559986-54ba-4368-9ac0-f2f4745d4b78","name":"MANGORADIO"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"https://reyfm-stream16.radiohost.de/reyfm-original_mp3-192","name":"REYFM - #original"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"http://stream.dancewave.online:8080/dance.mp3","name":"Dance Wave!"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"https://drive.uber.radio/uber/bollywoodnow/icecast.audio","name":"Mirchi Top 20"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"http://stream-uk1.radioparadise.com/aac-320","name":"Radio Paradise (320k)"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"https://icecast.walmradio.com:8443/classic","name":"Classic Vinyl HD"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"https://icecast.walmradio.com:8443/jazz","name":"Adroit Jazz Underground"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"https://icecast.walmradio.com:8443/christmas","name":"Christmas Vinyl HD"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"https://icecast.walmradio.com:8443/walm","name":"WALM HD"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"http://198.15.94.34:8006/stream","name":"Deep House Lounge"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"https://playerservices.streamtheworld.com/api/livestream-redirect/SAM03AAC226_SC","name":"#1980s Zoom"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"http://ice3.somafm.com/groovesalad-128-mp3","name":"SomaFM Groove Salad"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"http://jking.cdnstream1.com/b22139_128mp3","name":"101 SMOOTH JAZZ"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"http://jazzblues.ice.infomaniak.ch/jazzblues-high.mp3","name":"Jazz Radio Blues"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"http://ep256.hostingradio.ru:8052/europaplus256.mp3","name":"Europa Plus"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"http://lin3.ash.fast-serv.com:6026/stream_96","name":"Rockabilly-radio.net"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"https://streaming.nrjaudio.fm/ou7xugf3s5gi?origine=playernrj","name":"NRJ Hits"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"http://retroserver.streamr.ru:8043/retro256.mp3","name":"Ретро FM"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"https://dfm-disc90.hostingradio.ru/disc9096.aacp","name":"DFM Дискач 90-х"}, {"active":true,"hostname":"https://playerservices.streamtheworld.com/api/livestream-redirect/977_COUNTRY_SC","name":".977 Country"} ]

entry.name: icon
entry.label: Main Icon

entry.name: iconFallback
entry.label: Main Icon

entry.name: defaultVolume
entry.label: Default volume (0-100)

entry.name: fadeEnabled
entry.label: Smooth fade on station change

entry.name: fadeDuration
entry.label: Fade duration in ms

entry.name: albumArtEnabled
entry.label: Lookup album art via iTunes

entry.name: blurBackdrop
entry.label: Blurred backdrop in now playing

entry.name: favorites
entry.label: Favorite stations (JSON array of names)

entry.name: mprisEnabled
entry.label: Enable system media keys (MPRIS)

entry.name: autoBitrate
entry.label: Automatically pick highest available bitrate via radio-browser.info

entry.name: syncOffsetMap
entry.label: Per-device lag in ms — Bluetooth keyed by MAC, wired keyed by sink name (JSON)

entry.name: searchHistory
entry.label: Recent successful web searches, newest first (JSON array)

entry.name: syncVerifiedMs
entry.label: Residual speaker spread measured by the last verify pass (ms); -1 means never verified

entry.name: deviceTrims
entry.label: Per-device volume balance, 0.05-1.0 of the master level (JSON: device id to factor)

entry.name: deviceChannels
entry.label: Per-speaker channel in the combined output: L, R or M (mono mix); absent means stereo (JSON: device id to mode)

entry.name: syncExcluded
entry.label: Speakers sitting out of the combined output; absent means included (JSON: device id to true)

entry.name: syncOffsetMs
entry.label: Extra latency reported for Bluetooth sinks while the combined output is active (ms)

entry.name: combinePrevOutput
entry.label: Output device chosen before the combined output was enabled — restored when a session ends uncleanly

entry.name: combinePrevDefault
entry.label: System default sink before the combined output took it over — restored when a session ends uncleanly

entry.name: combineMasterPct
entry.label: Combined output master level the room was left at — the next enable's ramp ends here instead of at full passthrough

entry.name: combineWanted
entry.label: The sync switch as the user left it — a login rebuilds the group instead of silently dropping it

entry.name: autoHeal
entry.label: When a saved station's stream dies, look up its current address on radio-browser.info and follow it

entry.name: downloadFormat
entry.label: Download format: best (max quality, no re-encode), mp3, opus, mp4 (video)

entry.name: history
entry.label: Recently played tracks (JSON)

entry.name: likedSongs
entry.label: Liked tracks (JSON)

entry.name: reportClicks
entry.label: Report an anonymous listening click to radio-browser.info when a station starts playing — opt-in: anything leaving the machine is the user's call

entry.name: downloadDir
entry.label: Download directory (empty = ~/Music/OnAir)

entry.name: aiHelperEnabled
entry.label: Clean up track title with Claude CLI before searching/downloading — opt-in: sends track names to an external service

entry.name: followSystemAccent
entry.label: Use the system accent color instead of the built-in emerald theme

entry.name: recordMaxMinutes
entry.label: Hard cap for a single recording, in minutes (disk-fill protection)

entry.name: recordFormat
entry.label: Recording format: original (bit-exact copy, recommended), mp3 (re-encode), wav (uncompressed)

entry.name: recSchedules
entry.label: Scheduled recordings (JSON array)

entry.name: alarms
entry.label: Wake-up alarms (JSON array)

entry.name: schedTzOffset
entry.label: Last-seen timezone offset (minutes) for the schedulers; 9999 = unknown

entry.name: audioOutputDevice
entry.label: Audio output device id for local playback (empty = system default)
